macroGoal: Transition routine development orchestration from manual Codex guidance to a Command Steward led, preview-first, human-gated self-cycle.
northStar: Two consecutive full cycles complete without Codex intervention except human-owned decisions.
hardRules: Do not bypass launch, merge, health, or human-required gates.
Do not launch runtime workers when main health is red.
Do not close issues with open PRs.
Treat token, time, cost, and human intervention as facts.
Every self-cycle result must write back to GitHub, ai-state, docs, tests, or telemetry.
successCriteria: Command Steward emits recommended actions from facts.
Self-cycle produces launch, merge, close, and reconcile candidates.
State reconciler reports no critical drift.
Human only approves previewed actions and high-risk boundaries.
